title: Pentacalia urbani
intro: Pentacalia urbani, a species of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, is a member of the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, providing health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and protect against oxidative stress. Bioactive constituents of Pentacalia urbani include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Pentacalia urbani is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, with the most common preparations being a decoction made with the plant's leaves and stems, which is used to treat various ailments.
